data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Damage/cleaning bond', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is satisfied. While the use case mentions a '$500 damage deposit held', there is no concrete evidence from API reads or persisted state checks that verifies the enforcement or handling of this bond in the booking process. This indicates a gap in the validation of the requirement, as the evidence does not fully support the need for the bond to be satisfied.
gaps: No evidence confirming the enforcement or handling of the damage/cleaning bond.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
